title: Day-of-Week Session Filter (Monday Suppression + Wednesday Boost)
summary: Add a day-of-week multiplier to the brain loop's entry confidence scoring. Statistical backtests across multiple sources show consistent intraday seasonality: Monday opens — especially gap-down opens — have the worst risk/reward of any weekday (negative mean reversion, no follow-through). Wednesday shows the strongest gap continuation behaviour (67% of 1%+ gap-ups continued higher open-to-close). Friday is strongest for gap-fill strategies. The 'Turnaround Tuesday' pattern has a documented +7.7% annualised CAGR when isolated and traded mechanically (1993–2026 backtest, QuantifiedStrategies). This is a free, parameter-light edge that requires only checking datetime.weekday() — no additional data sources needed.
research_topic: Win Rate Improvement — Backtesting Robustness, Walk-Forward Validation & Intraday Timing Signals
expected_impact: Avoiding Monday morning gap-down entries eliminates a consistently negative-expectancy setup; SPY 1%+ Monday gap-downs averaged an additional -0.20% open-to-close (vs +0.21% on other days); Wednesday gap-ups continued upward 67% of the time
deferral_reason: not in paper_trading_single_account Active pipeline — deferred for future stage review
